67f1a2000000000000000100 Name: Knight's Armament KS-1 5.56x45 assault rifle lower receiver (Black)
67f1a2000000000000000100 Description: Knight's Armament Company developed the KS-1 5.56x45 carbine to set a new standard in assault platforms. Featuring completely ambidextrous, machined-in controls and built specifically around KAC's highly efficient, proprietary mechanics rather than standard AR-15 parts, this receiver serves as the foundation for modern military operations.
67f1a2000000000000000101 Name: Knight's Armament KS-1 upper receiver assembly (Black)
67f1a2000000000000000101 Description: A proprietary KS-1 upper receiver assembly for the KAC/L403A1 weapon family, finished in standard black. Engineered specifically to index with URX-6 handguards via a shift-resistant locking notch, housing KAC's E3.2 rounded-lug bolt group.
67f1a2000000000000000104 Name: Knight's Armament KS-1 ambidextrous charging handle (Black)
67f1a2000000000000000104 Description: A robust, high-performance ambidextrous AR-15 charging handle manufactured by Knight's Armament. Features extended, textured latch handles to facilitate rapid charging from either side of the firearm, even with gloved hands.
67f1a2000000000000000111 Description: An ultra-premium, match-grade 11.5-inch barrel assembly for the KS-1 platform. Deeply dimpled with KAC's signature ball-mill cut pattern to decrease weight and accelerate heat-shedding, featuring a proprietary E3.2 barrel extension.
67f1a2000000000000000113 Description: A match-grade cold-hammer-forged 13.7-inch dimpled barrel, designed specifically for the KS-1 upper receiver and URX-6 handguards. This mid-length barrel configuration is most notably deployed on the British Armed Forces' L403A1 AIW system.
67f1a2000000000000000114 Description: An exceptionally rigid, mid-length 14.5-inch dimpled barrel for the KS-1. Deeply fluted using Knight's specialized ball-milling to dramatically speed thermal release while minimizing weight out front, utilizing the proprietary E3.2 extension.
67f1a2000000000000000116 Description: A match-grade, full-length 16-inch barrel for the KS-1 rifle system. Employs KAC's highly distinctive ball-milling process to maximize mechanical rigidity and surface cooling area while providing a notable reduction in recoil and full muzzle velocity.
67f1a2000000000000000120 Name: Knight's Armament URX-6 10.5 inch M-LOK handguard (Black)
67f1a2000000000000000120 Description: The Knight's Armament URX-6 10.5-inch free-floating handguard, designed specifically for the short-barreled KS-1 variants. Built with KAC's extremely rigid barrel nut design and self-indexing receiver alignment notch, completely preventing handguard rotation and protecting laser/sight zero under heavy impact.
67f1a2000000000000000121 Name: Knight's Armament URX-6 12.75 inch M-LOK handguard (Black)
67f1a2000000000000000121 Description: The Knight's Armament URX-6 12.75-inch free-floating M-LOK handguard. Designed specifically for standard military-length KS-1 carbines, including the British L403A1 AIW. Self-indexes with the upper receiver via an anti-rotation tab to provide a monolithic, rock-solid mounting base.
67f1a2000000000000000122 Name: Knight's Armament URX-6 15 inch M-LOK handguard (Black)
67f1a2000000000000000122 Description: The Knight's Armament URX-6 15-inch free-floating handguard in black. Delivers an extended mounting profile for accessory placement and support-hand control over longer-barreled KS-1 builds, without sacrificing structural rigidity.
67f1a1000000000000000100 Name: Knight's Armament KS-1 5.56x45 assault rifle lower receiver (FDE)
67f1a1000000000000000100 Description: The custom lower receiver of the Knight's Armament Company KS-1 5.56x45 carbine, finished in Flat Dark Earth (FDE). Engineered with fully ambidextrous, machined-in controls including dual magazine and bolt releases, this frame operates as the core receiver extension host for the premium L403A1 weapon system.
67f1a1000000000000000101 Name: Knight's Armament KS-1 upper receiver assembly (FDE)
67f1a1000000000000000101 Description: A proprietary KS-1 upper receiver assembly for the KAC/L403A1 weapon family, finished in Flat Dark Earth (FDE). Engineered specifically to index with URX-6 handguards via a shift-resistant locking notch, housing KAC's E3.2 rounded-lug bolt group.
67f1a1000000000000000104 Name: Knight's Armament KS-1 ambidextrous charging handle (FDE)
67f1a1000000000000000104 Description: A robust, high-performance ambidextrous AR-15 charging handle manufactured by Knight's Armament, finished in FDE. Features extended, textured latch handles to facilitate rapid charging from either side of the firearm, even with gloved hands.
67f1a1000000000000000111 Description: An ultra-premium, match-grade 11.5-inch barrel assembly for the KS-1 platform, finished in FDE. Deeply dimpled with KAC's signature ball-mill cut pattern to decrease weight and accelerate heat-shedding, featuring a proprietary E3.2 barrel extension.
67f1a1000000000000000113 Description: A match-grade cold-hammer-forged 13.7-inch dimpled barrel finished in Flat Dark Earth (FDE), designed specifically for the KS-1 upper receiver and URX-6 handguards. This mid-length barrel configuration is most notably deployed on the British Armed Forces' L403A1 AIW system.
67f1a1000000000000000114 Description: An exceptionally rigid, mid-length 14.5-inch dimpled barrel for the KS-1, finished in FDE. Deeply fluted using Knight's specialized ball-milling to dramatically speed thermal release while minimizing weight out front, utilizing the proprietary E3.2 extension.
67f1a1000000000000000116 Description: A match-grade, full-length 16-inch barrel for the KS-1 rifle system, finished in FDE. Employs KAC's highly distinctive ball-milling process to maximize mechanical rigidity and surface cooling area while providing a notable reduction in recoil and full muzzle velocity.
67f1a1000000000000000120 Name: Knight's Armament URX-6 10.5 inch M-LOK handguard (FDE)
67f1a1000000000000000120 Description: The Knight's Armament URX-6 10.5-inch free-floating handguard finished in Flat Dark Earth (FDE), designed specifically for the short-barreled KS-1 variants. Built with KAC's extremely rigid barrel nut design and self-indexing receiver alignment notch, completely preventing handguard rotation and protecting laser/sight zero under heavy impact.
67f1a1000000000000000121 Name: Knight's Armament URX-6 12.75 inch M-LOK handguard (FDE)
67f1a1000000000000000121 Description: The Knight's Armament URX-6 12.75-inch free-floating M-LOK handguard finished in Flat Dark Earth (FDE). Designed specifically for standard military-length KS-1 carbines, including the British L403A1 AIW. Self-indexes with the upper receiver via an anti-rotation tab to provide a monolithic, rock-solid mounting base.
67f1a1000000000000000122 Name: Knight's Armament URX-6 15 inch M-LOK handguard (FDE)
67f1a1000000000000000122 Description: The Knight's Armament URX-6 15-inch free-floating handguard in Flat Dark Earth (FDE). Delivers an extended mounting profile for accessory placement and support-hand control over longer-barreled KS-1 builds, without sacrificing structural rigidity.
67f1a1000000000000000102 Description: A proprietary, military-grade AR-15 receiver extension (buffer tube) designed by Knight's Armament, finished in FDE. Built to lock securely into the KS-1 receiver, offering multiple stock adjustment positions.
67f1a1000000000000000105 Description: A specialized, proprietary ultra-low profile gas block manufactured by Knight's Armament. Designed to press-fit and pin directly onto the custom-profile KS-1 barrels under the URX-6 handguards, establishing a sealed interface with KAC's straight gas tube system.
67f1a2000000000000000103 Name: KAC M-LOK to Picatinny mount adapter
67f1a2000000000000000103 Description: An extremely low-profile M-LOK to Picatinny rail adapter manufactured by Knight's Armament. Engineered to provide a rugged, secure mounting point for Picatinny-compatible tactical lights, lasers, and foregrips on modern M-LOK handguards.
6a2af4a615eb6538834cd535 Description: The Knight's Armament Company 3-prong flash eliminator, designed for 5.56x45 barrels. Offers outstanding flash suppression characteristics and serves as the precise mounting host for the KAC QDC (Quick Disconnect Coupler) ecosystem.
6a3da86d69fe0a0ad5c17045 Name: Sons of Liberty Gun Works MK1 5.56x45 lower receiver (Black)
6a3da86d69fe0a0ad5c17045 Description: A highly reliable mil-spec lower receiver manufactured by Sons of Liberty Gun Works for their MK1 AR-15 platform. Machined from forged 7075-T6 aluminum and finished in a standard black hardcoat. Known for tight tolerances, exceptional durability, and rigorous quality control.

6a3da95acfdde81a0cc1704d Description: A forged 7075-T6 aluminum flat-top upper receiver made by Sons of Liberty Gun Works, finished in black. Built to strict military specifications to ensure seamless pairing with SOLGW lower receivers and reliable operation in adverse conditions.

6a3daa32c8041e05c7c17055 Description: A high-quality 11.5-inch combat-grade barrel manufactured by Sons of Liberty Gun Works. 6a3daab01be02bcf4dc17059 Name: Sons of Liberty Gun Works 14.5" 5.56x45 barrel for AR-15
6a3daab01be02bcf4dc17059 Description: A versatile 14.5-inch combat-grade barrel from Sons of Liberty Gun Works. Chambered in 5.56x45 NATO with a 1:7 twist rate. Designed to provide enhanced muzzle velocity and accuracy at medium ranges without sacrificing the mobility of a carbine.
6a3db319a3d2c9be0ec1705d Name: Sons of Liberty Gun Works 10.5-inch M-LOK handguard (Black)
6a3db319a3d2c9be0ec1705d Description: A robust 10.5-inch free-float M-LOK handguard by Sons of Liberty Gun Works, finished in black. It utilizes a heavy-duty locking mechanism for maximum rigidity and modularity, perfectly complementing short-barreled setups.

6a3db4105e381c3c9fc17073 Description: An intermediate-length A5 receiver extension (buffer tube) by Sons of Liberty Gun Works. Features enhanced drainage and adjustment positions, optimizing the recoil impulse and cycle reliability of the AR-15 platform.
